videos.headline: Jordan Waters puts Duke up early with 24-yard TD
videos.description: Jordan Waters breaks through the hole and scores the touchdown from 24 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Waters puts Duke up early with 24-yard TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Waters scores his 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: Jordan Waters scores the short touchdown, putting Duke up 14-0 early in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Waters scores his 2nd TD of the game) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard finishes sweet run with a stiff-arm
videos.description: Duke quarterback Riley Leonard eludes multiple tacklers and goes 33 yards downfield for an impressive run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard finishes sweet run with a stiff-arm) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ben Bryant floats one to A.J. Henning for a 14-yard Northwestern TD
videos.description: Northwestern gets on the board as A.J. Henning lofts one into the end zone to Ben Bryant for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ben Bryant floats one to A.J. Henning for a 14-yard Northwestern TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard plows into end zone for a Duke TD
videos.description: Duke goes up 24-7 as quarterback Riley Leonard keeps it himself for a short touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard plows into end zone for a Duke TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard scores his 2nd rushing TD of the day
videos.description: Riley Leonard rolls out and eases into the end zone for a 2-yard Duke touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard scores his 2nd rushing TD of the day) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Peyton Jones cruises into end zone for Duke TD
videos.description: Duke goes up 38-7 as Peyton Jones eases into the end zone for a 15-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Peyton Jones cruises into end zone for Duke TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brendan Sullivan goes airborne for a Northwestern TD
videos.description: Northwestern gets a touchdown late in the fourth quarter as Brendan Sullivan runs it in from 10 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brendan Sullivan goes airborne for a Northwestern TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET
